ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funders" (
  "funder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funder */,
  "funder_name" TEXT /* Name of the funder */,
  "funder_type" TEXT /* Type of funder (e.g., government, foundation, corporate) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the funder */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the funder */,
  "funding_priority" TEXT /* Funding priorities of the funder */,
  "application_guidelines" TEXT /* Link or document path to the funder's application guidelines */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the funder was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the funder's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grantees" (
  "grantee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grantee */,
  "grantee_name" TEXT /* Name of the grantee */,
  "grantee_type" TEXT /* Type of grantee (e.g., non-profit, charity, community group) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the grantee */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the grantee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the grantee */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the grantee's website */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the grantee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the grantee was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the grantee's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grantee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "funder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funder providing the grant */,
  "grantee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grantee receiving the grant */,
  "grant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant type */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant application */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date the grant was awarded */,
  "award_amount" REAL /* Amount of the grant award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grant project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the grant */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the grant project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the grant project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the grant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_funder_id FOREIGN KEY ("funder_id") REFERENCES funders ("funder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_grant_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_type_id") REFERENCES grant_types ("grant_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_grantee_id FOREIGN KEY ("grantee_id") REFERENCES grantees ("grantee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_types" (
  "grant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant type */,
  "grant_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the grant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reports_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the outcome is associated with */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was achieved */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome */,
  "outcome_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to measure the outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the outcome was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_outcomes_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was completed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reviewers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reviewers_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the decision is associated with */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "decision_type" TEXT /* Type of decision */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the decision was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_decisions_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES grant_reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_decisions_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the payment is associated with */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the payment was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_payments_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the communication is associated with */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date the communication was sent */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication */,
  "communication_status" TEXT /* Status of the communication */,
  "communication_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the communication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the communication was sent */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_communications_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_documents_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the metadata is associated with */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_metadata_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)
